scenario.name: missing_architecture
scenario.trigger: plan/architecture.md does not exist when the agent is dispatched.

required_actions.action: Do not proceed with API design.
Report to the user: "API design requires plan/architecture.md as input. Architecture defines system boundaries and integration points."
Request that the Architecture agent be dispatched first.

prohibited_actions.action: Do not guess or invent architecture. Do not design APIs without architecture context.

scenario.name: conflicting_endpoints
scenario.trigger: Architecture or HLD suggests endpoints that conflict with each other or with PRD requirements.

required_actions.action: Surface the conflict to the user with specific references (which documents, which sections).
Present the conflicting requirements side by side.
Ask the user to resolve: which requirement takes priority, or how to reconcile.
Document the user's decision in the API spec.

scenario.name: unclear_data_contracts
scenario.trigger: Architecture or HLD references data entities without clear structure; API design cannot define request/response schemas.

required_actions.action: Flag the unclear entities in the draft spec with "Structure TBD — depends on data-architecture.md".
Recommend that the Data Architecture agent produce plan/data-architecture.md first, or in parallel.
If user proceeds, document placeholder schemas and note they must align with data-architecture when available.

prohibited_actions.action: Do not invent data schemas that belong in data-architecture. API design consumes schemas; it does not define entity structure.

scenario.name: missing_prd
scenario.trigger: plan/prd.md does not exist when the agent is dispatched.

required_actions.action: Do not proceed with API design.
Report to the user: "API design requires plan/prd.md for functional requirements and integration needs."
Request that the PRD agent be dispatched first.

scenario.name: missing_hld
scenario.trigger: plan/hld.md does not exist; only architecture exists.

required_actions.action: Flag in the output: "HLD not yet available; design may be refined when HLD is produced."
Design at the architecture boundary level; avoid over-specifying internal details.
